name: Turkey-Macaroni Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Crumble turkey into the Dutch oven; stir in onion and green pepper.
3. Cook until turkey is no longer pink; drain, reserving juices in the Dutch oven.
4. Stir broth into juices. Heat to boiling.
5. Stir in macaroni; reduce heat. Simmer, stirring frequently, until broth is almost absorbed, about 10 minutes.
6. Stir in turkey mixture and remaining ingredients except 2 tablespoons of cheese.
7. Cook over low heat for 10 mins. Salt and pepper to taste.
8. Sprinkle the rest of the cheese on top and serve.
